title: cerradicola bullata var. magnifolia
side_effects: Cerradicola bullata var. magnifolia can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and interactions with medications. Some reported side effects include nausea, dizziness, and stomach pain due to the plant's high concentration of toxic compounds. Additionally, improper use of Cerradicola bullata var. magnifolia can lead to respiratory problems, such as coughing and shortness of breath, particularly in individuals with pre-existing respiratory conditions. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant can also exacerbate conditions like hypertension, kidney problems, and liver damage.
